job_title: Full Stack Automation Engineer – Software Infrastructure
job_description:
• MySQL and database design experience.
• DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines experience with tools like Ansible.
• Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to work collaboratively and independently.
• Experience in releasing high-availability production services.
• Experienced in CI automation tools such as Buildbot and Jenkins.
• Desired degrees: Bachelor or Master of SciencePreferred field: Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or Electrical Engineering AMD Partner Hub Authorized Distributors AMD University Program Translate customer requests into actionable development proposals.
• Full stack development expertise: React, Python, PHP, Ruby.
• Proficient with cloud infrastructure: AWS, Azure.
• Customer events News & media Who we are Innovation Careers Sustainability Supplying EEO and Affirmative Action.

• Minimum QualificationsBS in Computer Science or related field, or industry equivalentExperience with computer graphics (e.
• OpenGL), especially real-time rendering pipelines, ideally through real-world projectsExperience with low-level programming interfacing with HWProficiency with shader and shading language (HLSL, Metal)Proficiency with a scripting language, e.

• You will collaborate closely with game studios, engine teams, and internal engineering groups to drive adoption, optimize performance, and deliver an outstanding developer experience.
• We are seeking a Developer Relations Engineer with a strong gaming industry background to help expand and strengthen Arm’s developer ecosystem in China.
• This role is ideal for someone who has hands-on experience developing games, building real-time graphics systems, or directly supporting game studios, and who is passionate about enabling developers on modern graphics and AI technologies.
• Act as the technical voice of game developers by gathering real-world feedback from game studios, technical artists, and engine teams, and translating those insights into actionable requirements for product, platform, tooling, and support teams.
• Experience or background as a Technical Artist (TA), or close collaboration with TA teams, with knowledge of shaders, materials, rendering features, and performance constraints.
• Strong background in the gaming industry, with hands-on experience as a game developer, graphics engineer, engine programmer, or in a role directly supporting game studios.
• Engine-level optimization experience is a strong plus.
